message:
feat(store,command,repl): add per-DB expire tracking and cursor-based active expiry

fr-store: Add db_expires_counts array tracking per-database expire
counts alongside the global expires_count. Update expire_at/
expire_at_milliseconds/persist to maintain per-DB counts. Change
ActiveExpireCycleResult.next_cursor from usize to Option<Vec<u8>>
for proper cursor-based iteration. Add keys_in_db() method for
database-scoped key enumeration with lazy expiry.

fr-command: Add new command implementations leveraging per-DB tracking.

fr-repl: Adjust replication types for updated cursor representation.

fr-runtime: Minor runtime adjustments for new store API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
